untranslatable_reason: Signal requires dynamic classification of range size (narrow/medium/wide) and adaptive entry/exit logic based on range classification. Exact thresholds for range_size_classification are not defined by author. Moving average speed parameter is also silent. These require custom logic beyond simple indicator comparisons and operator conditions.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using pivot points (s1/r1) as support/resistance proxies and sma_20 as moving average signal. However, the core requirement—adjusting entry opportunity based on dynamically classified range size with different exit strategies per range type—cannot be fully expressed without custom multi-condition logic that evaluates ATR relative bands or other range metrics. The signal is inherently adaptive and requires conditional branching at strategy execution time rather than static rules.
